chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-209 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No.769/2021. 2. For hearing of main case 01.06.2022 Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent Nos.2&3. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser, (Customs). -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After hearing the case at considerable length and with the consent of the parties, we pass the following order. i. That the Customs Authorities will make final assessment within shortest possible time in respect of the matter with regard to the classification of the item imported by the petitioner. ii. That the Customs Authorities while passing the said order would give ample opportunity of hearing and would pass well- reasoned and speaking order within a period of one month’s time. iii. That till such time the assessment is made the Bank Guarantee furnished by the petitioner would not be encashed. With these directions the instant petition alongwith the listed and pending application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
